title: How one verse a day rewires the way you think
caption:
Your mind doesn't fix itself.

You woke up today with a mind already formed by whatever ran through it last night. The news. The feed. The algorithm that's been optimizing for your attention since you were 14. That formation is running right now — under every decision — unless you interrupt it before it gets traction.

One verse. Before the first notification. Read it slowly. Let it land. Carry one line into the day.

That's the whole practice. It doesn't take a chapter. It takes 60 seconds of actual encounter with something older and truer than anything in your feed.

"Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly." — Colossians 3:16

Save this and do it tomorrow before you open anything else.

#faith #scripture #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #biblestudy #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
